cards.question: Функция greet
cards.task: Напиши функцию greet(string $name): string, возвращающую "Hello, {$name}!".
cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

function greet(string $name): string
{
    return "Hello, {$name}!";
}

cards.question: Сумма массива
cards.task: Функция total(array $numbers): int — сумма элементов (без array_sum).
cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

function total(array $numbers): int
{
    $sum = 0;
    foreach ($numbers as $n) {
        $sum += $n;
    }
    return $sum;
}

cards.question: array_map — квадраты
cards.task: Функция squares(array $numbers): array — квадраты каждого int.
cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

function squares(array $numbers): array
{
    return array_map(fn (int $n): int => $n * $n, $numbers);
}

cards.question: array_filter чётные
cards.task: Функция evens(array $numbers): array — только чётные числа.
cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

function evens(array $numbers): array
{
    return array_values(array_filter($numbers, fn (int $n): bool => $n % 2 === 0));
}

cards.question: match HTTP status
cards.task: Функция statusLabel(int $code): string через match: 200->'OK', 404->'Not Found', default 'Unknown'.
cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

function statusLabel(int $code): string
{
    return match ($code) {
        200 => 'OK',
        404 => 'Not Found',
        default => 'Unknown',
    };
}

cards.reference:

function userCity(?User $user): ?string

cards.question: Named arguments
cards.task: Функция createUser(string $email, int $id = 0): User — вызов с named args id и email в примере комментария.
cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

function createUser(string $email, int $id = 0): User
{
    return new User(id: $id, email: $email);
}

// createUser(id: 1, email: 'a@b.c');

cards.question: Interface + implementation
cards.task: Interface Logger с log(string $message): void; класс EchoLogger.
cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

interface Logger
{
    public function log(string $message): void;
}

final class EchoLogger implements Logger
{
    public function log(string $message): void
    {
        echo $message, PHP_EOL;
    }
}

cards.question: PDO prepared SELECT
cards.task: Функция fetchUserName(PDO $pdo, int $id): ?string — SELECT name FROM users WHERE id = ?.
cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

function fetchUserName(PDO $pdo, int $id): ?string
{
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare('SELECT name FROM users WHERE id = ?');
    $stmt->execute([$id]);
    $row = $stmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
    return $row['name'] ?? null;
}

cards.question: JSON encode/decode
cards.task: Функция toJson(array $data): string через json_encode с JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR.
cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

function toJson(array $data): string
{

}

cards.question: Custom exception
cards.task: Класс ValidationException extends Exception; validateNonEmpty(string $value, string $field): string.
cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

final class ValidationException extends Exception
{
    public function __construct(public readonly string $field, string $message)
    {
        parent::__construct($message);
    }
}

function validateNonEmpty(string $value, string $field): string
{
    if (trim($value) === '') {
        throw new ValidationException($field, 'must not be empty');
    }
    return $value;
}

cards.question: Arrow function pipeline
cards.task: Функция positiveSquares(array $numbers): array — квадраты положительных через array_filter + array_map.
cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

function positiveSquares(array $numbers): array
{
    $positive = array_filter($numbers, fn (int $n): bool => $n > 0);
    return array_map(fn (int $n): int => $n * $n, $positive);
}

cards.question: First-class callable
cards.task: Класс Calculator с add(int $a, int $b): int; переменная $fn = $calc->add(...).
cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

final class Calculator
{
    public function add(int $a, int $b): int
    {
        return $a + $b;
    }
}

$calc = new Calculator();
$fn = $calc->add(...);

cards.question: Trait Timestampable

cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

trait Timestampable
{
    protected ?DateTimeImmutable $createdAt = null;

    public function touch(): void
    {
        $this->createdAt = new DateTimeImmutable();
    }
}

cards.question: Union type parseId
cards.task: Функция parseId(int|string $value): int — если string, (int)$value.
cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

function parseId(int|string $value): int
{
    return is_int($value) ? $value : (int) $value;
}

cards.question: Generator rangeStep
cards.task: Generator function rangeStep(int $start, int $stop, int $step = 1): Generator.
cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

function rangeStep(int $start, int $stop, int $step = 1): Generator
{
    for ($value = $start; $value < $stop; $value += $step) {
        yield $value;
    }
}

cards.question: Closure counter
cards.task: Функция makeCounter(): Closure возвращает closure, увеличивающий внутренний счётчик.
cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

function makeCounter(): Closure
{
    $count = 0;
    return function () use (&$count): int {
        return ++$count;
    };
}

cards.question: SplFileObject read lines
cards.task: Функция readLines(string $path): array читает файл построчно через SplFileObject.
cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

function readLines(string $path): array
{
    $file = new SplFileObject($path);
    $lines = [];
    foreach ($file as $line) {
        if ($line === false) {
            continue;
        }
        $lines[] = rtrim($line, "\r\n");
    }
    return $lines;
}

cards.question: Enum method label
cards.task: Backed enum Priority: int (Low=1, High=2) с методом label(): string.
cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

enum Priority: int
{
    case Low = 1;
    case High = 2;

    public function label(): string
    {
        return match ($this) {
            self::Low => 'low',
            self::High => 'high',
        };
    }
}

cards.question: htmlspecialchars helper

cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

function e(string $value): string
{

}

cards.question: Password hash verify
cards.task: Функции hashPassword(string $plain): string и verifyPassword(string $plain, string $hash): bool.
cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

function hashPassword(string $plain): string
{
    return password_hash($plain, PASSWORD_DEFAULT);
}

function verifyPassword(string $plain, string $hash): bool
{
    return password_verify($plain, $hash);
}

cards.question: Simple router
cards.task: Класс Router с методами get(string $path, callable $handler): void и dispatch(string $method, string $path).
cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

final class Router
{
    /** @var array<string, callable> */
    private array $routes = [];

    public function get(string $path, callable $handler): void
    {
        $this->routes['GET ' . $path] = $handler;
    }

    public function dispatch(string $method, string $path): mixed
    {
        $key = $method . ' ' . $path;
        if (!isset($this->routes[$key])) {
            throw new RuntimeException('Not found');
        }
        return ($this->routes[$key])();
    }
}

cards.question: Value object Email validate
cards.task: Класс EmailValue с private string $value, конструктор валидирует filter_var FILTER_VALIDATE_EMAIL.
cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

final class EmailValue
{
    public function __construct(private readonly string $value)
    {
        if (filter_var($value, FILTER_VALIDATE_EMAIL) === false) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('Invalid email');
        }
    }

    public function toString(): string
    {
        return $this->value;
    }
}

cards.question: Fibonacci generator
cards.task: Generator function fibonacci(int $count): Generator — первые $count чисел Фибоначчи.
cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

function fibonacci(int $count): Generator
{
    $a = 0;
    $b = 1;
    for ($i = 0; $i < $count; $i++) {
        yield $a;
        [$a, $b] = [$b, $a + $b];
    }
}

cards.question: Palindrome check
cards.task: Функция isPalindrome(string $text): bool — игнорировать регистр и не-буквы.
cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

function isPalindrome(string $text): bool
{
    $clean = strtolower(preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9]/i', '', $text) ?? '');
    return $clean === strrev($clean);
}

cards.question: HttpClient stub
cards.task: Класс HttpResponse с promoted int $status, string $body и методом isSuccessful(): bool.
cards.reference:
<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

final class HttpResponse
{
    public function __construct(
        public int $status,
        public string $body,
    ) {
    }

    public function isSuccessful(): bool
    {
        return $this->status >= 200 && $this->status < 300;
    }
}
